Subject: Enron Netherlands
Message:
Dear Louise,

I hope everything is well at your end.

Given the fact that UBS seems be the buyer of the Enron trading part in the US I was wondering if you think it is worthwhile to think about (or discuss) an extension to Europe (or the Netherlands in particular).
